commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a package-local `dist/` fallback to external channel secret contract resolution, covers it with a regression test, and adds a changelog fix entry for #77241.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and `v2026.5.3` only probe the plugin root for external channel secret contract files, while npm-installed plugin packages use package-local `dist/` output and Discord SecretRefs are documented. I did not run a live gateway or tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The latest diff no longer has a narrow code-review defect, but the PR is unmergeable against current main and overlaps another open fix PR, so maintainers should choose and rebase the canonical branch.

target.title: fix(plugins): resolve npm channel plugin contract files from dist/ subdirectory
